name: Random Float
description: Generates a random float between min and max.
python_code:
import random
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode

class RandomFloatNode(BaseNode):
    name = "Random Float"
    description = "Generates a random float between min and max."
    
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.icon_path = "icons/dice.svg"
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-START]
        self.add_input("min", "float", widget_type="float")
        self.add_input("max", "float", widget_type="float")
        self.add_output("value", "float")
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-END]
        
    async def execute(self, inputs):
        mn_val = inputs.get('min')
        mx_val = inputs.get('max')
        
        mn = float(mn_val) if mn_val is not None else 0.0
        mx = float(mx_val) if mx_val is not None else 1.0
        
        return {'value': random.uniform(mn, mx)}

def register_node():
    return RandomFloatNode
